# Firecrawl setup for Codex

The `$seo-firecrawl` skill is already installed. Configure the optional `firecrawl-mcp` server using [the central Codex integration guide](../../../CODEX_INTEGRATIONS.md).

Before crawling, confirm the MCP tools are visible, state the intended page limit and depth, estimate vendor credits, and obtain approval for large crawls. Start with a site map or a small sample when possible.
